description: Prepare Gather Lists for Apple App Store distribution — marketing landing page, support page, routing change to serve app at /app, App Store metadata review, screenshot test data, iOS Simulator screenshots, and screenshot README update.

credentialRequirements.fallbackPlan: Cannot create test data or capture authenticated screenshots without credentials
Share with screenshot account's own second device instead
credentialRequirements.notes: E2E test account: e2e-test@gatherapp.dev (share target for collaborator avatars)

userStories.title: Marketing Landing Page
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see a professional landing page at gatherlists.com so I understand what Gather Lists is and can download it.
acceptanceCriteria: Static HTML file at public/index-marketing.html (see US-003 for Vercel routing)
Hero section with app name, tagline ('Gather your lists, meals, and more'), and the stacked logo from public/logo/stacked.svg
App Store download badge (use Apple's official badge artwork, link to: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6760205400)
3-4 feature highlight cards: Smart Lists, Real-Time Sharing, Recipes & Meal Planning, Works Everywhere (web + iOS)
Footer with links to: Support (/support), Privacy Policy (/privacy.html), App (/app), and copyright '© 2026 Gather Lists'
Responsive design — looks good on mobile (375px+) and desktop
Uses system font stack (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, ...) matching privacy.html styling conventions
Gather Lists brand colors: primary green #4CAF50, dark background #1a1a2e if using a dark hero section
Page includes proper <meta> tags: og:title, og:description, og:image (use icon-512x512.png), og:url
Page includes <meta name='apple-itunes-app' content='app-id=6760205400'> smart app banner
No JavaScript required — pure HTML + CSS (inline styles like privacy.html)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Implemented. Also updated --bg-page to #1a1a2e in both light and dark modes to match marketing hero.

userStories.title: Support Page
userStories.description: As a user needing help, I want to find answers to common questions at gatherlists.com/support so I can resolve issues without emailing.
acceptanceCriteria: Static HTML file at public/support.html
Page title: 'Support — Gather Lists'

FAQ accordion section with 8-10 questions covering: creating lists, sharing, adding items, multi-device use, profile picture, recipes, data privacy, light/dark mode, account deletion, contacting support
Accordion uses CSS-only expand/collapse (no JavaScript required) — <details>/<summary> elements
Contact section at the bottom with support email: support@gatherlists.com
Back link to gatherlists.com (marketing page)
Matches visual style of privacy.html (container card, system font stack, rounded corners, subtle shadow)
Responsive design — works on mobile and desktop
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Implemented. Also fixed pre-existing PWA SW intercepting static HTML pages (vite.config.js).

userStories.title: Vercel Routing — Serve Marketing at Root, App at /app
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to update the Vercel routing so the marketing page is served at /, the React app at /app, and the support page at /support.
acceptanceCriteria: Update vercel.json rewrites so: / serves public/index-marketing.html, /app and /app/* serve index.html (the React SPA), /support serves public/support.html, /privacy.html continues to serve public/privacy.html, /.well-known/* continues to pass through, all other routes fall through to the SPA at /app
Update the Vite config base option to /app so all built assets are served under /app/assets/
Update the PWA manifest start_url and scope to /app
Update the service worker scope to /app
Update any hardcoded references to / in the React app that assume root (e.g., login redirects, OAuth callbacks)
Update Supabase auth redirect URLs in code to use gatherlists.com/app instead of gatherlists.com
The marketing page links 'Open App' / 'Try Web App' to /app
Existing Universal Links / deep links still work (route to /app paths)
Build succeeds (npm run build)
Verify in browser: gatherlists.com shows marketing page, gatherlists.com/app shows the React app
Lint passes
userStories.notes: RISKIEST STORY — touches Vite config base, PWA manifest scope, service worker scope, OAuth redirects, and Universal Links. PWA re-install may be required (acceptable pre-launch).

userStories.title: Update App Store Metadata
userStories.description: As a developer preparing for submission, I need the App Store metadata to accurately reflect the current native iOS app features.
acceptanceCriteria: Review docs/app-store/metadata.md against the actual native iOS app features
Verify the description accurately describes current capabilities (review what's real vs. aspirational)
Update Support URL to https://gatherlists.com/support
Update Marketing URL to https://gatherlists.com
Verify subtitle is ≤30 characters (current is 35 chars — needs trimming)
Verify keywords are ≤100 characters total
Update 'What's New' text if needed
Ensure no references to features that don't exist in the native app
File saved and committed

userStories.title: Create Screenshot Test Data
userStories.description: As a developer preparing screenshots, I need realistic, visually appealing data in the test account so the App Store screenshots look professional.
acceptanceCriteria: Log into the screenshot account (screenshots@gatherlists.com / Test1234) via the iOS Simulator app or web app

Create 4-5 lists with varied names, colors, and emojis: '🛒 Weekly Groceries' (green, 12-15 items with images), '🎉 Party Supplies' (purple/pink, 6-8 items), '✈️ Trip Packing' (blue, 8-10 items), '🏠 Home Essentials' (orange, 5-6 items), '🍳 Meal Prep' (yellow, 8-10 items)
Primary list ('Weekly Groceries') has items with product images, multiple stores, mix of checked/unchecked, quantities and units
Create 2 recipe collections: 'Weeknight Dinners' (🍝, 3-4 recipes with images, ingredients, steps) and 'Healthy Breakfasts' (🥗, 2-3 recipes with images)
At least 1 recipe has a hero image
Share at least 1 list with the e2e test account (e2e-test@gatherapp.dev) so collaborator avatars are visible in screenshots
Configure at least 1 home screen widget (if possible on Simulator)
Data looks natural and realistic — not 'Test Item 1', 'Test Item 2'
userStories.notes: Manual data entry step — Builder will need to interact with the app to create this data.

userStories.title: Capture App Store Screenshots
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to capture polished screenshots on iPhone 15 Pro Max Simulator for the App Store listing.
acceptanceCriteria: All screenshots captured on iPhone 15 Pro Max Simulator (6.7" — 1290 × 2796)
Status bar shows 9:41 AM (Apple's standard) — set Simulator time with xcrun simctl status_bar
Capture 6-8 screens in light mode: Lists overview, Shopping list detail, Add item, Recipe collections, Recipe detail, Sharing, Dark mode variant, Widgets (optional)
Screenshots saved to docs/app-store/screenshots/iphone-6.7/ with descriptive filenames
Screenshots are clean — no debug overlays, no console logs visible, no error states
Each screenshot shows meaningful, realistic data (from US-005)
Screenshots committed to the repo
userStories.notes: Depends on US-005 for test data. Uses xcrun simctl io booted screenshot for capture.

userStories.title: Update Screenshot README
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the screenshot guide updated to reflect what was actually captured and how.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/app-store/screenshots/README.md with: list of actual screenshots captured with filenames and descriptions, device and Simulator version used, date captured, note on test data setup (reference US-005)
Remove references to Capacitor-based capture methods (Capacitor was retired)
Update the recommended screenshots list to match what was actually captured
File saved and committed
userStories.notes: Depends on US-006 for actual screenshot list.
